reasoning: The RBI_NBFC control 2.5 focuses on access control, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC mechanisms. The control's emphasis on preventing excessive privileges and enforcing least privilege aligns with ensuring no cluster-admin bindings and enforcing least privilege in Kubernetes. Additionally, managing service account token automounting is relevant to access control. While MFA is not natively supported in Kubernetes, configuring OIDC authentication can integrate external identity providers that enforce MFA.
title: Access Control
